name: Haroseth (Passover Sweets)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, coarsely grind the hazelnuts together.
Add the almonds and process until combined.
Next, add the dates and raisins and continue processing
until you achieve a smooth mixture with some texture remaining.
2. Form small balls of the mixture, each about 3/4-inch in diameter.
Place each ball on a piece of wax paper.
3. Serve when desired during Passover.
Passover is a challenging time for enjoying desserts as most sweets are "hametz" or prohibited. The Moroccan people have addressed part of this issue with these delightful date and nut balls.
